name: get_timeline
description: Fetch a paginated timeline of statuses. Supports the home timeline (accounts you follow), local timeline (same instance), and federated/public timeline (all known instances).

parameters.name: timeline
parameters.description: The timeline to fetch. One of: home, public. Use 'public' with 'local=true' for local timeline.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of statuses to return (1-40, default 20).

parameters.name: max_id
parameters.description: Return results older than this status ID (for pagination).

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return results newer than this status ID.

parameters.name: local
parameters.description: When timeline is 'public', return only local statuses if true.

body.content: Just deployed a new feature! Check it out.
